cards.back: The process of assigning a process to a CPU for execution
The process of switching from one process to another, involving saving and restoring the context of each process
A situation in which two or more processes are blocked indefinitely, each waiting for the other to release a resource
The process of allocating system resources such as CPU time, memory, and I/O devices to processes
A signal sent by a hardware device to the operating system to request attention, such as a keyboard press or disk completion
